message:
perf(btree): reduce delete defrag page borrows [bd-1dp9.6.7.11]

Before profile: Arc<[u8]>::make_mut was a top-five hotspot at 3.89% self-time in perf_update_delete. After this change, make_mut is 0.58% self-time and no longer top five; read_cell_pointers_into is 1.93%.

Hyperfine (10 runs, 10000 rows, 10 iters, both): pre target/release/perf-update-delete 272.9 ms +/- 4.5 ms; post /tmp/cargo-target/release/perf-update-delete 256.1 ms +/- 3.7 ms, 1.07x faster (~6.2%).

Isomorphism: page bytes and B-tree state are unchanged; delete defrag now takes one mutable page slice for the move/fill/header-write block instead of repeatedly reborrrowing the same PageData.
